TBT Introduction

Welcome to your Total Breakthrough Training and congratulations on taking your next step to coaching success and discovery. During your Total Breakthrough Training you will be learning about 6 families and the way Tony helped them achieve breakthroughs. Together we�re going to go into depth and get really focused on what�s happening in a particular family�s life. Just like in your coaching with individuals and couples, you�ll find that even though your client might be coaching one or two individuals, you are effecting and changing a whole family system. The work you do will have long reaching benefits for many generations.

Each Mastery Unit of your training focuses on Tony�s work with one family and as you experience the transformations taking place you will also be learning how to model yourself after this master interventionist. You will be discovering layer upon layer of relationship and strength within the families. In every case there is an ownership process happening where you learn how Tony guides an individual or couple to redefine their challenges, create meaningful goals, and strengthen relationships, coupled with an understanding and expansion of their ability to connect with their world and larger family unit. This is a method for true coaching success at the highest level.

Some of you at times might miss the narrations that are part of other trainings we offer at RMT. However, there is a reason why we haven�t narrated these coaching sessions. We want you to do the work and grow beyond what you thought possible as a coach. How do you do this? It�s easy you just pause the video and write down why you think Tony just said what he said, write down why that challenge, or why that question. This gets your SI muscles strong in a new and very crucial way. Then when you listen to Cloe, Mark and Magali go into the details about each concept, strategy or coaching session you will get an even greater understanding. The light bulbs going off are going to be enough to light up a whole house.

In the training we are going to be teaching you in detail about the following strategies: Mode of Being, Leverage, Discovering Strengths, Ordeals, Key Decisions, Finding the Spark, Expanding the Unit, Presence, Hierarchy, and Triangles in Relationships. You�ll have a whole selection of strategies to work with the problems in your client�s life. Some of the problems we cover in TBT training are: Destructive Communication Patterns, Owning One�s Presence and Purpose, Becoming a Leader in the Family, Making a new Key Decision, Overcoming Fear, New Patterns for Past Trauma, Turning Anxiety into Adventure, and Rekindling Passion as well as lots more.

You will also be learning all about Tony�s Seven Master Steps. And because we know how important it is for you to experience all this growth in real time through your own experience we�ve included coaching clients, friends, or fellow students into your training. At the end of your TBT Guide you�ll find all the details about working with clients. These can be individuals you are already seeing, or friends that you get to volunteer to work with you, or new clients. We encourage you to find people in the world, other then fellow students to work with, so that you begin right away to expand your community and experience as Coach and change maker.

Finally, I want you to know a little about why we�ve chosen to use Milton Erickson�s work as our reading for Total Breakthrough Training. The book you are going to read is �My Voice Will Go With You: The Teaching Tales of Milton H Erikson� by Sidney Rosen. Please order it right away through Amazon or a local bookstore. It�s readily available in new and used bookshops, but Amazon is often the quickest way to get it immediately. So, why Milton Erickson? Well he is the grandfather of strategic therapy, NLP, coaching, and Strategic Intervention. From his work many fields of Psychological thought and strategy were born, for example: Hypnosis, NLP, Strategic Therapy. In our opinion, all types of Life Coaching owe their foundation to Milton Erickson. In this brilliant book of Stories you gain a resource for your own coaching work. The stories in My Voice Will Go With You can be retold to your clients during sessions, as well as be a training in and of themselves. In our lectures about Erickson�s work, we will be teaching you how to use a story in your sessions to effect transformation, understanding and unconscious leverage.

Over the next 22 weeks your life is going to change, so take a deep breath and let the discovery process begin. We are honored and thrilled to be with you on this path of growth and mastery! Please join us for weekly Power Sessions and for community Discussion Groups.

The action forms you�ll be completing to graduate from TBT are just simple questions which encourage you to reflect on what you gained from that week�s training. Don�t worry if you feel stuck answering a question, you can simply say �this was cool� or �I liked this�� or �I started to think about this� There are no right or wrong answers. This is a personal �take aways� journal you are keeping, so we know that you engaged in the training. Many of you will also be taking notes as you watch and listen, so you can just grab a few of your notes and put them in your action form. Don�t worry about your writing style, grammar or brilliance. No one is grading you on these action forms. Feel free to share a particular thought or statement you found powerful that may not seem to fit into one of the questions.
